title: RoseLoot
description: A custom loot plugin for mobs, blocks, fishing, chests, piglin bartering, advancements, archaeology, vaults, and trial spawners!
body:
![RoseLoot](https://imgur.com/YWDZ0pA.png)

  ![Description](https://imgur.com/MPZOC0Q.png) **RoseLoot** is a **custom loot plugin** that allows the loot manipulation of mobs, blocks, fishing, chests, piglin bartering, advancements, archaeology, vaults, and trial spawners! This custom drops plugin is **extremely customizable**, making it possible to **manipulate loot tables** in almost any thinkable way! ![Feature List](https://imgur.com/qOKyo04.png)     ![Features](https://imgur.com/1kdnDJy.png) **RoseLoot** has **tons of conditions**, so you can always specify under which exact circumstances you want loot to drop. We tried our best to make all ideas possible! If you have any suggestions for what you'd like to see be added to the plugin, [tell us on our Discord server](https://discord.gg/MgUsTBK)! Check out some of its features: - [Define the **conditions**](https://github.com/Rosewood-Development/RoseLoot/wiki/Conditions) that must be matched for the table to run. - [Edit the **meta**](https://github.com/Rosewood-Development/RoseLoot/wiki/Item-Meta) of items dropped. - Require any **placeholder** from PlaceholderAPI to match your assigned value. - Choose the **amount to drop** for items, and manipulate those amounts using your choice of numeric distribution. - Decide the **chance** to drop. - **Overwrite existing** drops or add to them. - Edit **experience** drops. - Run **commands** and send **messages**. - Spawn **particles** to create cool visual effects. - Cause **explosions**! - Reward money from [supported **economy** plugins](https://github.com/Rosewood-Development/RoseLoot/wiki/Items#economy). - Drop items from the [supported **custom item** plugins](https://github.com/Rosewood-Development/RoseLoot/wiki/Custom-Item-Plugins). - Add conditions for mobs from [supported **custom mob** plugins](https://github.com/Rosewood-Development/RoseLoot/wiki/Plugin-Compatible-Values).     ![Showcase](https://imgur.com/mwz147C.png) Here are *some* of the features **in action**!

    ![Documentation](https://imgur.com/wUufwBX.png) To learn **how to use RoseLoot**, [check out our **wiki**](https://github.com/Rosewood-Development/RoseLoot/wiki)! Everything you could ever know has been completely documented there. It's how we remember everything, too!  

    ![Support](https://imgur.com/VNxgt6I.png) While **RoseLoot** is free to download and free to use, receiving support from our support team requires that you **pay for this plugin**. We are happy to answer your questions regarding what the plugin can do, but any in-depth questions and support will be reserved for those who have [**purchased** the plugin](https://www.spigotmc.org/resources/roseloot.101979/)! If you need any **help**, have found a **bug**, or you have any **questions**, please [join our **Discord** server](https://discord.gg/MgUsTBK)! We offer all support through our server. Feel free to use the **question channels** to talk and ask questions!  

    ![Thank You](https://imgur.com/OJ75iHT.png) A **big thanks** to everyone who supports us and uses our plugins! A lot of time and love goes into them. If you like this plugin, [check out our other **plugins**](https://modrinth.com/organization/rosewood-development)! If you want to give us some **extra support**, we would be absolutely grateful if you considered [subscribing to our **Patreon**](https://www.patreon.com/RosewoodDevelopment)!
